options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <topCell|vCell>+ # Hinsts that are derived from (instantiate) this module or design. ((topCell|vCell)+, optional)

options.name: -deleted
options.description: Generates a report with the deleted flops and the reason.

options.name: -full
options.description: Generates a report with the sequential name, whether it was inferred or instantiated, the type of sequential, and the type of reset. NOTE: in the current Genus implementation, this is -hier.

options.name: -hinst
options.description: Hinst for the report. By default, the design is reported. ((hInst), optional)

options.name: -mapped
options.description: Generates a report with synthesis requirements modified to map the sequential.

options.name: -optimized
options.description: Generates a report with sequentials optimized to constants or are unloaded, but have not been removed.

options.name: -out_file
options.description: File to dump the report. Default is stdout.
